overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a grassy hillside trail during golden hour. The character approaches a ridge revealing a distant valley settlement, passes a white horse, and continues toward a smoke column rising in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy dirt path through rolling hills with tall pine trees on the left side

entered.detail: dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
steep rocky terrain rising on the left side behind the trees
dark smoke rising vertically into the sky from a distant source
rolling green grass covering the hillside and path

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a grassy dirt path through rolling hills, with tall pine trees lining the left side and a distant smoke column visible ahead against a partly cloudy golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ridge overlook with valley settlement view

events.description: landscape opens up to reveal a panoramic view of a valley settlement with buildings and roads below on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge line as the view opens up to reveal the valley settlement below

entered.detail: small town or camp with wooden buildings visible in the valley below
winding dirt road leading through the valley settlement

segments.scene_description: Reaching a ridge overlook, the landscape opens to reveal a panoramic view of a valley settlement with wooden buildings and a dirt road visible below on the right. The terrain becomes more open with scattered trees as the character continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail approaching smoke source

events.description: a white horse appears standing on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the smoke column, passing a white horse grazing on the left

notable_agents.action: white horse standing still on the left side of the path, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: wooden telegraph or utility pole beside the trail
large fallen tree trunk lying on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes a white horse standing on the left side of the trail, continuing along the dirt path toward the distant smoke column. A utility pole and fallen log mark the roadside as the valley settlement fades from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a grassy hillside trail that transitions from a sheltered wooded path into an expansive valley overlook. It begins with the character walking steadily along a dirt path lined with tall pine trees, while a distant column of smoke rises against a partly cloudy golden hour sky. As the character reaches a ridge, the landscape opens into a panoramic view of a valley settlement with wooden buildings and dirt roads stretching out below. The scene then shifts back toward the trail as the character passes a white horse standing by the roadside, moving past a utility pole and a fallen log. Finally, the valley settlement fades from view as the camera continues its forward progression toward the distant smoke.
